creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

I have committed the update portion.

The pkg-install portion have not been committed -- I think the port should not change permissions on existing files, can you change that to just populate the staging area with the right permissions?  (see https://wiki.freebsd.org/ports/StageDir Makefile {pre,do,post}-install: targets section for more details).
